app.name: App Store Connect CLI
app.one_liner: A fast, lightweight, and scriptable CLI for the App Store Connect API to automate iOS, macOS, tvOS, and visionOS release workflows from terminal, IDE, or CI/CD pipeline.

screens.name: CLI Terminal Interface
screens.purpose: Execute App Store Connect operations via composable, canonicalized command structure without interactive prompts.
primary_actions: Pipe JSON output into scripts or CI/CD pipelines
Run `asc` commands for builds, TestFlight, app info, IAP pricing, and subscriptions
Submit apps to the Wall of Apps via `asc apps wall submit`

rust_commands.name: asc_app_info
rust_commands.purpose: Canonical command family to manage app information, consolidating legacy `app-infos` functionality.

rust_commands.name: asc_apps_wall_submit
rust_commands.purpose: Submit app entries to the public Wall of Apps showcasing real-world usage.

rust_commands.name: asc_builds_test_notes
rust_commands.purpose: Manage beta build localizations and test notes under a unified builds subcommand, replacing `beta-build-localizations`.

rust_commands.name: asc_iap_pricing
rust_commands.purpose: Canonical command tree for In-App Purchase pricing management, currently under migration.

rust_commands.name: asc_subscriptions_pricing_equalize
rust_commands.purpose: Equalize subscription pricing across regions with validation for missing metadata.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add deep MISSING_METADATA diagnostics for subscriptions
week 1: Enable `asc apps wall submit` with validation
week 1: Implement canonical `asc app-info` command family
week 1: Migrate beta build localization logic into `asc builds test-notes`
acceptance_tests: Command `asc subscriptions pricing equalize --product-id premium_monthly` validates metadata completeness before applying changes.
New app submission via `asc apps wall submit --name 'MyApp' --bundle-id com.example.myapp` appears in Wall of Apps after PR merge.
Running `asc builds test-notes set --build 123 --locale en-US --text 'Fixed crash'` succeeds and replaces legacy `beta-build-localizations` behavior.
User can run `asc app-info get --bundle-id com.example.app` and receive structured JSON without prompts.
